commands.review_summary:
The branch repairs lint, type, import-cycle, and gateway-watch CI failures by relocating channel delivery-target helpers, lazy-loading deprecated DM policy runtime helpers, and tightening script, plugin, and memory-core type paths.

PR surface: Source +12, Tests +4, Other +9. Total +25 across 23 files.

Reproducibility: yes. there is a credible source/CI reproduction path: the PR body names the failing main CI run and the exact lint, type, import-cycle, build, and gateway-watch commands. I did not rerun those write-prone or broad checks in this read-only review.
